specific_question: What percentage of the readers who subscribe to MediConn Solutions' wellness blog since its launch in 2024 have been converted to in person clients?
answer: Since the launch of MediConn Solutions' wellness blog in February 2024, 1200 subscribers have been converted to in person clients.
dr_question: Starting in 2026 through Q1 2027, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the use of AI in creating the right patient experience, starting from the first touch point through care delivery and follow up to increase the number of patients that engage with their tele-health services?
